# mixpanel_theme (Resource)

Manages a Mixpanel theme.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "mixpanel_theme" "brand" {
  project_id = 1234567

  name = "Brand Theme"
  type = "dashboard"

  global_access_type = "viewer"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)
- `type` (String)

### Optional

- `global_access_type` (String) One of: `off`, `viewer`, `editor`.
- `project_id` (Number)
- `theme_id` (Number)
